original_statement: "England and France are essentially tied for the #3 position [in the PELE model for the 2026 FIFA World Cup]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Pre-tournament team ratings
statement_context: Excerpt from a comprehensive 100,000-simulation tournament forecast published by Silver Bulletin. Nate Silver reports the output of the PELE model (developed with Joseph George) published on or around 3 June 2026.
resolution_criteria: At least one of England or France reaches the semi-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
source_text_snippet: England and France, meanwhile, are essentially tied for the #3 position.
